'''âw-f-r''' ('''kawafar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nav|nav]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nav|nav]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-f-r
|-
! Lemma
| kawafar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwafar|thiwafar]] || [[word:jiwafar|jiwafar]] || [[word:shiwafar|shiwafar]] || [[word:kiwafar|kiwafar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwafar|thuthuwafar]] || [[word:jujuwafar|jujuwafar]] || [[word:shushuwafar|shushuwafar]] || [[word:kukuwafar|kukuwafar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwafar|thuwafar]] || [[word:juwafar|juwafar]] || [[word:shuwafar|shuwafar]] || [[word:kuwafar|kuwafar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwafar|thuwafar]] || [[word:juwafar|juwafar]] || [[word:shuwafar|shuwafar]] || [[word:kuwafar|kuwafar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewafar|thewafar]] || [[word:jewafar|jewafar]] || [[word:shewafar|shewafar]] || [[word:kewafar|kewafar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowafar|thothowafar]] || [[word:jojowafar|jojowafar]] || [[word:shoshowafar|shoshowafar]] || [[word:kokowafar|kokowafar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowafar|thowafar]] || [[word:jowafar|jowafar]] || [[word:showafar|showafar]] || [[word:kowafar|kowafar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowafar|thowafar]] || [[word:jowafar|jowafar]] || [[word:showafar|showafar]] || [[word:kowafar|kowafar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwafar|thĂŠwafar]] || [[word:jĂŠwafar|jĂŠwafar]] || [[word:shĂŠwafar|shĂŠwafar]] || [[word:kĂŠwafar|kĂŠwafar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawafar|thathawafar]] || [[word:jajawafar|jajawafar]] || [[word:shashawafar|shashawafar]] || [[word:kakawafar|kakawafar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawafar|thawafar]] || [[word:jawafar|jawafar]] || [[word:shawafar|shawafar]] || [[word:kawafar|kawafar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawafar|thawafar]] || [[word:jawafar|jawafar]] || [[word:shawafar|shawafar]] || [[word:kawafar|kawafar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawafar|shawafar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawafar|goshawafar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawafar|gokishawafar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawafarnĂŒ|shawafarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawafarnknĂŒ|goshawafarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawafarnĂŒ|gokishawafarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawafarshĂ«|shawafarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawafarnkshĂ«|goshawafarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawafarshĂ«|gokishawafarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawafaro|shawafaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawafarnkro|goshawafarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawafaro|gokishawafaro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawafarmu|shawafarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawafarnkmu|goshawafarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawafarmu|gokishawafarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawafarsher|shawafarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawafarnksher|goshawafarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawafarsher|gokishawafarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawafarng|shawafarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawafarnkng|goshawafarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawafarng|gokishawafarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawafarya|shawafarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawafarnkya|goshawafarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawafarya|gokishawafarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawafaryam|shawafaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawafarnkyam|goshawafarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawafaryam|gokishawafaryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawafarnĂŒshĂ«|shawafarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawafarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawafarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawafarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawafarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawafarnĂŒro|shawafarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawafarnknĂŒro|goshawafarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawafarnĂŒro|gokishawafarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawafarnĂŒmu|shawafarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawafarnknĂŒmu|goshawafarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawafarnĂŒmu|gokishawafarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawafarshĂ«nĂŒ|shawafarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawafarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawafarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawafarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawafarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawafarshĂ«ro|shawafarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawafarnkshĂ«ro|goshawafarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawafarshĂ«ro|gokishawafarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawafarshĂ«mu|shawafarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawafarnkshĂ«mu|goshawafarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawafarshĂ«mu|gokishawafarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawafaronĂŒ|shawafaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawafarnkronĂŒ|goshawafarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawafaronĂŒ|gokishawafaronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawafaroshĂ«|shawafaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawafarnkroshĂ«|goshawafarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawafaroshĂ«|gokishawafaroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawafaromu|shawafaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawafarnkromu|goshawafarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawafaromu|gokishawafaromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawafarmunĂŒ|shawafarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawafarnkmunĂŒ|goshawafarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawafarmunĂŒ|gokishawafarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawafarmushĂ«|shawafarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawafarnkmushĂ«|goshawafarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawafarmushĂ«|gokishawafarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawafarmuro|shawafarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawafarnkmuro|goshawafarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawafarmuro|gokishawafarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
